intro.speaker: dee
intro.text: [Situation — Dee restocking shelves, practical as ever. She clocks your boots and guesses your problem before you speak.]

options.text: [Ask her to look over your flock.]

checkup.speaker: dee
checkup.text: [Result — honest read on your chickens: kind delivery, no sugarcoating. Sets up the egg-contract relationship.]

chat.speaker: dee
chat.text: [Flavor — one working line about the season's animal troubles around the county.]
